description: LLM creates write-capable agents with non-overlapping file ownership and validation gate

criteria.name: write_tools_explicit
criteria.description: Write-capable agents explicitly request tools like write, bash
criteria.pass_condition: At least one agent includes 'write' or 'bash' in its tools array.

criteria.name: non_overlapping_dirs
criteria.description: Each agent is assigned a distinct directory
criteria.pass_condition: Agent prompts specify distinct directories (e.g., alpha/ and beta/). No shared directories.

criteria.name: validation_gate
criteria.description: A gate or validation phase checks the results
criteria.pass_condition: Script has a gate function or a separate validation phase that checks file existence/content.

criteria.name: files_created
criteria.pass_condition: Output shows evidence of file creation. Validation confirms files exist.

criteria.name: no_conflicts
criteria.description: No file ownership conflicts between agents
criteria.pass_condition: No error messages about file conflicts or cross-directory writes.

criteria.name: registerPhase_usage
criteria.pass_condition: Script uses registerPhase() for phase declarations.
